creator: hvo.pm@xs4all.nl
text:
Created attachment 175711
The sharfile of this new port

As per request of Mario Duhanic: the D2 Provider::Database

The D1 DPAE ships with Provider::Database but the D2 version not.

So here it is.

Tests:
- portlint -A
- make test
- make check-plist
- QA
- portmaster .

All fine.
